hero.title: Your Smile,
hero.subtitle: Experience world-class dental care with a gentle touch. We are dedicated to restoring and enhancing the natural beauty of your smile.

about.title: Caring for Your Smile with Excellence
about.text_1: At Devnanda Dental Clinic, we believe that a healthy smile is the foundation of a happy life. Led by Dr. Pritam, our team of dedicated professionals uses the latest technology to provide comfortable and effective treatments.
about.text_2: We understand that visiting the dentist can be stressful for some, which is why we've designed our clinic to be a sanctuary of calm and comfort. Your well-being is our top priority.

services.heading: Our
services.description: Providing Complete Oral Health Solutions for Every Smile

comparison.title: Choosing the Right Treatment for You
comparison.description: Both options have their own advantages. Let's compare them to help you make an informed decision.
metal_cons: Requires more effort in daily brushing
May have to avoid certain foods
More discomfort from brackets and wire
Requires more visits to the dentist
invisalign_pros: Much more comfortable as there are no wire
Requires fewer visits to the dentist
invisalign_cons: More costly due to the advanced 3D technology

cleaning.title: Results for Heavy Stains & Calculus
cleaning.description: Experience the transformation. Our professional cleaning removes deep-seated stains and stubborn calculus for a healthier, brighter smile.
cleaning.benefit_1_desc: Remove tea, coffee, and tobacco stains instantly.
cleaning.benefit_2_desc: Prevent gum disease by removing hard tartar build-up.
cleaning.benefit_3_desc: Smooth, clean surfaces that prevent future plaque accumulation.

reviews.heading: Our
reviews.description: See What People Are Saying About Our Dental Care

form.title: Share Your Experience
form.name: Your Name
form.review_placeholder: How was your experience with us?

default_reviews.seema: I had a great experience at Devnanda Clinic. The cleaning was painless and the staff was very professional.
default_reviews.mohit: Highly recommend Dr. Pritam for any dental issues. He explained the root canal procedure clearly and it was much easier than I expected.
default_reviews.jitendra: The clinic is very modern and hygienic. I'm very happy with my smile makeover. Best dentist in the area!

items.dentists_desc: Our team brings years of expertise and continuous learning to treat you better.
items.equipment_desc: We utilize the latest dental technology for precise and painless treatments.
items.hygienic_desc: We strictly adhere to sterilization protocols to ensure a safe environment.
items.affordable_desc: Top-quality dental services at transparent and competitive prices.

footer.description: Your trusted partner for a healthy, beautiful smile. Compassionate care for the whole family.
